credal_wrapper_temp_conformal.description: Ensemble (built via probly.method.credal_wrapper) with conformal RAPS, ablating a temperature-scaling layer between pooled-mean logits and the conformal step. Path A: no T. Path B: with T fitted on the calibration logits.

hetnet_temp_conformal.description: Single HetNet (probly.method.het_net) with MC-softmax loss, mean of MC samples at inference, then temperature scaling and conformal RAPS.

natpn_ensemble.description: Ensemble of N NaturalPosteriorNetwork members (probly.method.natural_posterior_network) trained with the standard postnet_loss; predictive probabilities are mean of per-member alpha/sum(alpha). No post-hoc calibration or conformal layer.

notes: All cifar10h runs use the canonical CIFAR-10 train embeddings (50000) for training and the CIFAR-10-H test embeddings (10000) split 0.25/0.75 stratified on hard labels into calib (2500) and test (7500).
two_moons uses sklearn.make_moons with n_samples=2000, noise=0.2, seed=0 split into 1280/320/400 stratified train/calib/test.
ECE is computed with 15 equal-width bins over the maximum predictive probability.
Conformal coverage and average set size are evaluated on the test split using probly.metrics.empirical_coverage_classification and average_set_size.
HetNet on dinov2_with_registers initially collapsed at lr=1e-2 (random predictions, then LBFGS overflow during temperature fit); the reported numbers use lr=1e-3 with global gradient clipping at 1.0.
